page_metadata.biotools__summary: NetBox is a Java-based software tool for performing network analysis on human interaction networks. It is pre-loaded with a Human Interaction Network (HIN) derived from four literature curated data sources, including the Human Protein Reference Database (HPRD), Reactome, NCI-Nature Pathway Interaction (PID) Database, and the MSKCC Cancer Cell Map.
